concerns.text: Both T001b and T005 are marked [P] but create overlapping data directory structures (e.g., data/stimuli/, data/processed/, data/measurements/). Running them in parallel can cause race conditions or duplicate work, violating the parallel‑safe guarantee.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 4 - T022 depends on US0 tasks (T010, T012)
concerns.text: User Story 1 (US1) includes task T022 which explicitly depends on US0 tasks (T010, T012). This makes US1 not independently shippable; the US block cannot be completed and tested without prior US0 work, breaching the ‘independently‑completable unit’ rule for user‑story groups.
